  • Overview

  • Help

    All Classes and Interfaces

    Class
    Description
    AuditEvent
    Immutable model representing a single audit trail entry.
    AuditEvent.Builder
     
    AuditEvent.Outcome
    Outcome of the audited operation.
    AuditLogAspect
    AOP aspect that captures audit trail entries for all methods annotated with AuditLog.
    FullMaskingStrategy
    Masking strategy that replaces the entire value with a fixed placeholder.
    MaskedArgumentAspect
    AOP aspect that intercepts bean method calls and replaces @Masked-annotated arguments with their masked representation before the method executes.
    MaskingRegistry
    Central registry that maps field names and patterns to their MaskingStrategy.
    MaskingStrategy
    Strategy interface for masking a sensitive field value before it is written to logs.
    OpenTelemetrySdkConfig
    Spring @Configuration that bootstraps the OpenTelemetry SDK and registers it as the global OpenTelemetry instance.
    OtlpLogbackAppender
    Logback AppenderBase implementation that forwards log records to a SigNoz (or any OpenTelemetry-compatible) collector via OTLP gRPC.
    PartialMaskingStrategy
    Masking strategy that reveals a configurable number of characters at the start and end of the value while masking the rest with asterisks.
    RegexMaskingStrategy
    Masking strategy that applies a regex to the raw value, replacing every match with a fixed replacement string.
    SigNozAuditHandler
    Default AuditEvent handler that writes a structured audit log entry via SLF4J using the AUDIT marker.
    SigNozAuditProperties
    Audit log configuration under signoz.audit.*.
    SigNozJsonEncoder
    Custom Logback encoder that wraps LogstashEncoder (Logstash-compatible JSON) and applies MaskingRegistry masking to every log record before serialisation.
    SigNozLoggingProperties
    Logging-specific configuration nested under signoz.logging.*.
    SigNozLoggingProperties.LoggingMode
    Output mode for log records.
    SigNozLoggingProperties.PatternConfig
     
    SigNozMetricsConfig
    Configures Micrometer to export metrics to SigNoz via the OTLP registry.
    SigNozProperties
    Root configuration properties for the SigNoz Spring Boot Starter.
    SigNozTracer
    Thin Spring-managed wrapper around the OpenTelemetry Tracer.
    SigNozTracingProperties
    Tracing-specific configuration nested under signoz.tracing.*.
    SigNozTracingProperties.PropagationFormat
    Propagation format for distributed context.
    SigNozWebProperties
    HTTP request/response logging configuration under signoz.web.*.
    TracedAspect
    AOP aspect that creates an OpenTelemetry span around every method annotated with Traced (or every public method on a class annotated with Traced).
